result.finding: Single custom bridge network 'photoalbum-network' connects both services (oracle-db and photoalbum-java-app). Both services are on the same network enabling DNS-based service discovery (e.g., 'oracle-db' hostname). No host or overlay networking. No Kubernetes network policies.
evidence: docker-compose.yml top-level: networks: photoalbum-network: driver: bridge
SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL uses hostname 'oracle-db' (Docker DNS resolution within network)
No Kubernetes NetworkPolicy resources (no K8s manifests)
values: No host networking, no overlay network
Inter-service communication: DNS-based (oracle-db hostname resolves within network)
